subject: chore: remove Koinz branding references
body:
Rename all Koinz Style Guide references to generic dark theme naming:
- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: "Koinz Style Guide" → "dark theme"
- docs/HISTORY.md: "Koinz Style Guide Implementation" → "Dark Theme Implementation"
- tailwind.config.js: comment references updated
- app.css: comment references updated
title: remove Koinz branding references
